textEn: When there comes Allah’s help and the conquest,

textAr: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
textEn: and you see people entering Allah’s religion in multitudes,
textTranslit: Wa ra-aitan naasa yadkhuloona fee deenil laahi afwajah

textAr: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
textEn: then glorify the praise of your Lord, and ask His forgiveness. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
textTranslit: Fa sab bih bihamdi rabbika was taghfir, innahu kaana tawwaaba
